pages.text: The Acknowledgment is both a mysterious guidebook and an ancient relic.$(br2)Right-clicking it opens this manual, which records relics, stones, scrolls, curses, and hidden knowledge.
pages.title: The Acknowledgment

pages.text: The Acknowledgment is not consumed and does not need to be equipped.$(br2)Hold it and right-click to read its current knowledge.
pages.title: As a Guide

pages.text: The Acknowledgment can also be swung like a weapon.$(br2)It deals modest damage, ignites struck enemies, and can be enchanted.
pages.title: As a Weapon

pages.text: When the bearer suffers under the Ring of the Seven Curses, The Acknowledgment softens part of the curse's pain.$(br2)It does not remove the curse, but it makes survival slightly more forgiving.
pages.title: Curse Resonance

pages.text: Craft The Acknowledgment, then right-click it to open this manual.
